title: Who Is He?
about:
Who Is He? or Who Is That? is a reaction image and exploitable meme depicting a scene of the children's animated cartoon Peppa Pig , showing a man with brown hair, stubble and a teal shirt looking in through a kitchen window at Peppa Pig's family. The man is notably highlighted with a red arrow and a yellow circle with the text "Who is he?" below. The picture originally comes from a YouTube video thumbnail by the channel TubbyTank, which was uploaded in April 2025.

In late 2025 and early 2026, the thumbnail spread online as a reaction meme, primarily as a sticker on TikTok in comment sections. As it garnered virality in early 2026, it was also recreated by memers who mimicked the style of the original image with other pop culture figures and IPs. The Peppa Pig scene with the human man in the meme is not actually from the show and appears to be a custom edit that added him into the window. Due to the mystery and virality surrounding him, the man also became the source of analog horror videos as he spread.
origin:
On April 10th, 2025, YouTuber [1] TubbyTank uploaded a video, titled "SHOCKING Mysteries In Peppa Pig That Can't Be UNCOVERED," that discussed various mysteries in the kids' TV show Peppa Pig . The video notably used a thumbnail featuring a scene with Peppa Pig's family gathered around a dinner table while a guy with brown hair, stubble and a teal shirt looks in on them through the kitchen window, highlighted with a red arrow and a yellow circle with the text "Who is he?" below him.

In nine months, the video received over 242,000 views, 1,100 likes and 190 comments, many of which commented on the thumbnail and referenced the Who Is He? meme that it later spawned in the following months.

The human man in the window, however, is not addressed in TubbyTank's video, and it's unknown who he is. Presumably, the character was created by TubbyTank and edited into the original scene that actually comes from the series.

The unedited moment from Peppa Pig with the window closed and the man missing was used as a thumbnail in a Hollywood Reporter [2] article published on August 22nd, 2018, which discussed a Peppa Pig film being released in China.

The man is also notably featured in another thumbnail by YouTuber TubbyTank, which was uploaded on April 22nd, 2025, in a video titled "Hidden SECRETS In Peppa Pig You NEVER NOTICED."
